expertAssessments.rationale: v8.11.194 deployed and running. Dashboard OTel slot, server counts, and resource alerts match expected values. Session data freeze confirmed after reload.
KRL grounded synthesis confirmed (searchKnowledgeBase 5건, OTel 18대 서버명 보존). Clarification trigger split verified (topology → 명확화, whole_fleet → direct). Off-domain guard working.
Semantic frame routing trust boundary confirmed: off-domain query gracefully deflected; positive framing on server query did not bypass real data analysis.
AI responses cited correct OTel values (CPU 28%/MEM 45-46%/Disk 35%, cache-redis-dc1-01 MEM 80-81%, db-mysql-dc1-primary Disk 60%). KRL topology answer preserved 18대/6역할 구조.
Chrome DevTools MCP used for all 12 test cases covering this week's commits. Screenshot and debug panel evidence captured.
Vercel usage carried from same billing period (effective 13.3467 USD, billed 0.0000 USD). No incremental cost from targeted QA session.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage carried over from QA-20260521-0549 same billing period; effective 13.3467 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount ~11571. No additional usage from this targeted QA session.

notes: T8 groundingMode UI debug metadata was not exposed, but the user-facing KRL answer was grounded and preserved expected OTel evidence. This remains an existing Task A observability follow-up, not a new regression.
